pages.text: ‘Mama, that dog looks like a sausage. A sausage with legs and a head.’ ‘And a tail!’
‘Mama, can we have that sausage dog?’ ‘No, sorry Thembsie. We can’t have a dog.’
‘Mama, those balloons look like sausages. ‘Can I play with them?’ ‘Yes Thembsie!’
Thembsie twists and shapes the! P O P balloons this way. P O! P! P O P And Thembsie twists and shapes the balloons that way.
‘Papa, can you make this balloon into a sausage dog?’ ‘Yes, Thembsie.’
Papa twists and shapes the balloon this way. And Papa twists and shapes the balloon that way. H E A! D T I L A! LG! ES
Thembsie and her sausage dog go for a walk. B O P! P! O H B O U N C E!
‘Thembsie, dinner time!’ calls Mama. ‘Mama, Papa, this is my sausage dog. Can he have some dinner?’
